basic_details.job_title: SPMCIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Security Printing and Minting Corporation of India Ltd. (SPMCIL)
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional (Legal, Finance, Technical, Cyber Security)
basic_details.short_information: SPMCIL is recruiting Young Professionals in Legal, Finance, Technical, and Cyber Security domains on contract basis.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: As mentioned in the table above (First Class where applicable). Experience: Post-qualification relevant experience as specified. Age Limit: As per SPMCIL norms for Young Professional positions (generally up to 30-32 years, check detailed advt.). Only Indian Nationals are eligible.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting based on eligibility and experience Personal Interview / Written Test (as decided by SPMCIL) Document Verification Final Selection
how_to_apply: Click on the online application link for Young Professionals.
Register and fill the application form carefully.
Upload required documents and submit before the closing date.
Take printout of the submitted application for future reference.
Opening Date: 17 August 2026 Closing Date: 18 August 2026
important_instructions: Engagement is on Fixed Term Contract basis only. No claim for regular absorption. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility criteria as on the closing date. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: SPMCIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: As mentioned in the table above (First Class where applicable). Experience: Post-qualification relevant experience as specified. Age Limit: As per SPMCIL norms for Young Professional positions (generally up to 30-32 years, check detailed advt.). Only Indian Nationals are eligible.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Application Shortlisting based on eligibility and experience Personal Interview / Written Test (as decided by SPMCIL) Document Verification Final Selection

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SPMCIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website www.spmcil.com . Go to “Career” section. Click on the online application link for Young Professionals. Register and fill the application form carefully. Upload required documents and submit before the closing date. Take printout of the submitted application for future reference. Opening Date: 17 August 2026 Closing Date: 18 August 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for SPMCIL Candidates
content_sections.text: Engagement is on Fixed Term Contract basis only. No claim for regular absorption. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility criteria as on the closing date. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SPMCIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The closing date for online application is 18 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are announced in SPMCIL Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Multiple vacancies across Legal, Finance, Technical, and Cyber Security domains.

faq.question: Q3. What is the nature of engagement in SPMCIL?
faq.answer: Fixed Term Contract Basis for Young Professionals.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Young Professional (Legal) in SPMCIL?
faq.answer: First class LL.B from a recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the experience required for Cyber Security Young Professional?
faq.answer: Minimum One year post-qualification experience in Cyber Security.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for SPMCIL Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: Apply online through the Career section on www.spmcil.com.

faq.question: Q7. What is the opening date for SPMCIL online application?
faq.answer: Online applications open from 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is SPMCIL Young Professional job permanent?
faq.answer: No. It is on Fixed Term Contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which company is recruiting Young Professionals in 2026?
faq.answer: Security Printing and Minting Corporation of India Ltd. (SPMCIL).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the detailed advertisement for SPMCIL Recruitment?
faq.answer: Visit the official website www.spmcil.com under the Career section.
